title: Zoro Faces the World’s Strongest Swordsman
description: On pages 12–15, Zoro confronts Dracule Mihawk, forcing his dream of becoming the world’s greatest swordsman into a brutal and public test.
scene: The Baratie battle pauses around a duel that dwarfs the immediate conflict: Zoro faces the gap between ambition and the world’s strongest swordsman.

dialogue.speaker: Mihawk
dialogue.text: to think that Mihawk would say such a thing...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Boy, what do you aim for?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: I'm going to do it anyways!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Like hell he'd be alright! But he is still alive! He only lost his conscious!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: that if I don't become... the world's strongest swordsman,

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: That I'm never going to lose again!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: until the day I fight him and win...

summary: This part is a defining moment for Zoro, showing that his dream is real enough to risk death and that his loyalty to Luffy survives defeat.
